title: First Post
body:
# `<Hello World>`

My name is Mubashir and these here are my Dev Logs. I've been sitting on this idea for quite a while. I learn a lot of cool stuff daily but never really record them in a structured way. So I've decided to start posting on this personal blog or whatever you wanna call it. 

I am a SWE by skill and am currently pursuing a Masters in AI from Macquarie University in Sydney Australia. On these logs I'll just write about stuff I learnt personally or academically, maybe write opinionated posts about AI/Tech, maybe share my experiences with a new technology I tried and also posts updates on Projects that I am working on. 

This is a very minimal logging set up for now and I plan to structure this site more in the future as I rack up posts and get into the habit of posting :).
